case_title: STELLA INTERNATIONAL, INC. VS. DALLAS A SAUNDERS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STELLA INTERNATIONAL, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE SAMUEL C. LAW. FILED BY STELLA INTERNATIONAL, INC. SAUNDERS, DALLAS A
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STELLA INTERNATIONAL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAUNDERS, DALLAS A $1,688.70 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,803.70, DEFENDANT WAIVED CHALLENGE TO VENUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED
- LETTER RECEIVED REGARDING REQUEST TO DISMISS -
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,688.70 FILED BY STELLA INTERNATIONAL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SAUNDERS, DALLAS A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-20-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-20-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM SAMUEL C. LAW. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY GUY PEREGO--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL C. LAW. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
